buttons.sub_hi: वे आपको क्या बताने के लिए बाध्य हैं

buttons.label_hi: मुझे हिरासत में लिया गया है
buttons.sub_en: The first hour, step by step

quote_en: I am not pleading for India to practise non-violence because it is weak. I want her to practise non-violence being conscious of her strength and power.
quote_hi: I am not pleading for India to practise non-violence because it is weak. I want her to practise non-violence being conscious of her strength and power.
before_sub_en: Pack this. Do this. Skip this.
before_sub_hi: यह साथ लें। यह करें। यह न करें।
